nodes.name: 鹤形目
nodes.summary: 鹤形目（Gruiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联126种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、灰冠鹤、Grey-winged trumpeter等126种鸟类。

nodes.name: 南亚
nodes.summary: 南亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联36种鸟类，包括斑头雁、原雞、蓝胸鹑等36种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 澳大拉西亞
nodes.summary: 澳大拉西亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括白眉鸭、Superb fruit dove、小田鸡等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 秧鸡科
nodes.summary: 秧鸡科（Rallidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Tsingy forest rail、Madagascar forest rail、Chestnut forest rail等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: 小田鸡
nodes.summary: 小田鸡（Baillon's crake，学名 Zapornia pusilla），分类上属于鹤形目，并归入秧鸡科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于南亚、澳大拉西亞，常见栖息地包括沼泽、湿地。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This species is migratory, wintering in East Africa and South Asia, as well as being a resident breeder in Africa and Australasia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This species is migratory, wintering in East Africa and South Asia, as well as being a resident breeder in Africa and Australasia

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Their breeding habitat is sedge beds and swamps, ranging from Eastern Europe to Honshu in Japan

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The total breeding population in Europe as of 2016 was suspected to be 4,000 to 9,000 individuals. They used to breed in Great Britain up to the mid-19th century, but the Hungarian population declined in the 20th century due to wetland drainage. There has been a recovery in north-western Europe in recent years, with the recolonisation of Germany and the Netherlands, and breeding suspected in Britain; an Irish record in 2012 was the first there since the 1850s. They nest in dry locations in wet sedge bogs, laying 4–8 eggs
